$comment: self-driving provisioning manifest (scripts/provision-target-repo.ts). Row 5 of the supercode study's §II.8.1 disposition table: self-driving takes BOTH governance choices — sdlc's `security` required check (the dispatched, blocking realization of security.yml — .github/workflows/security-gate.yml, wired via policy.box.gh-actions.propose_dispatch_checks) joins `ci` + `agent-review` + this profile's own `human-approval` seam as required merge gates. `provision.json` is install-owned (seed-once, never overwritten by upgrade — packages/core/src/upgrade.ts's INSTALL_OWNED_PATHS) so an adopter tunes it freely after the initial seed.
